hooks.command:
[ -d '.brain' ] && printf '
[MindLink] Persistent memory is active for this project.
If your context was just compacted or you feel uncertain about project state:
  → Re-read .brain/MEMORY.md  (project identity, decisions)
  → Re-read .brain/SESSION.md  (current task, what is next)
  → Re-read .brain/SHARED.md   (what other sessions have written — may or may not be currently running)
  → Re-read .brain/LOG.md      (last 5 entries for recent session history)
  → Run: mindlink status
Note: SHARED.md shows what other sessions wrote, not whether they are active right now.
' || true
